title: ConvSim Asset Metadata
description: Validates an asset metadata sidecar file (.meta.json). One metadata file per asset records license, type, and provenance for offline-first packs.

asset_id.description: Unique identifier for this asset within the pack.

type.description: Asset category. Determines how the runtime loads and displays the asset.

file.description: Relative path to the asset file from the pack root.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for this individual asset.

attribution.description: Required attribution text if the license demands it (e.g. CC BY 4.0).

source_url.description: Original source URL for attribution. Informational only — never loaded at runtime.

width_px.description: Width in pixels. Required for portrait and background assets.

height_px.description: Height in pixels. Required for portrait and background assets.

duration_seconds.description: Duration in seconds. Required for audio and music assets.

not.description: Asset metadata must not contain runtime-loaded URLs or executable fields.
